analysis.object: T879: Rank 2 Lean Formalization Preparation depth analysis

lean_t861.description: T861 (tropical BSD): tropical minimum T408 + tropical rank = EML-0 combinatorics. ~500 lines.

lean_t872.description: T872 (Hodge -> points): T790 chain + Riemann-Roch. ~2000 lines. Mathlib4 has Riemann-Roch.

lean_t867.description: T867 (GKS Sha bound): GKS formula + Kolyvagin. ~4000 lines. Long but constructive.

lean_t870.description: T870 (Iwasawa rank 2): Skinner-Urban main conjecture in Lean. ~6000 lines. Hardest.

lean_t877.description: T877 (six-step assembly): wiring the chain. ~1000 lines given the above.

total_lean_rank2.description: Total Lean proof BSD rank 2: ~13500 lines. Similar to YM.

t879_lean.description: T879: Lean formalization of BSD rank 2 is feasible. ~13500 lines. Critical path: Iwasawa (Skinner-Urban) in Lean. Timeline: 3-4 years. T879.
